title: neobartsia crisafullii subsp. acutiloba
intro: Neobartsia crisafullii subsp. acutiloba is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, a type of parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants. Traditionally, Neobartsia crisafullii subsp. acutiloba has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Neobartsia crisafullii subsp. acutiloba can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
